# Third Party Notices

This directory contains redistributable binaries from voidtools Everything.

- `Everything.exe`: Everything 1.4.1.1032 x64 portable runtime.
- `es.exe`: Everything command-line interface 1.1.0.30 x64.
- `License.txt`: voidtools Everything license text, including bundled third-party notices such as PCRE.

The Fast Window Everything app uses these binaries as a packaged portable runtime. Runtime settings and databases are written to the app data directory, not to this vendor directory.
